comment: Example configuration showing the tunable values for validate-image.mjs.
comment2: These values are NOT read from this file at runtime — they document the
comment3: defaults and the corresponding CLI flags. Copy the flags you need into
comment4: your CI invocation or wrapper script.

requiredLabels.description: Comma-separated key=value pairs every image must carry.

maxSizeMb.description: Maximum image size in megabytes. Images larger than this fail validation.

containerTool.description: Container runtime to use for inspection. Edit CONTAINER_TOOL in validate-image.mjs.

expectedEntrypoint.description: Exact ENTRYPOINT array to enforce. Set EXPECTED_ENTRYPOINT in validate-image.mjs.
